summary: Iteration 28 - Sessions Section Redesign COMPLETE. All features verified: purple gradient backgrounds, session_mode (online/offline/both), calendar components, testimonial_text field, time_slots, no images in sessions UI or admin form, and admin form with all new controls.
critical_code_review_comments: SessionsSection.jsx: Correctly uses purple gradient background (linear-gradient 135deg from #1e1033 to #7c3aed), MiniCalendar component, mode badges, testimonial display
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Purple gradient hero, BookingCalendar, time slots display, no hero image (gradient only)
AllSessionsPage.jsx: Purple gradient hero, card-based layout without images, mode badges on each card
AdminPanel.jsx Sessions Tab: Form has title, description, testimonial_text textarea, session_mode radios (online/offline/both), time_slots management with Add button, font controls, NO image uploader
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Iteration28_Session with session_mode='both', time_slots=['10:00 AM'], testimonial_text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sessions redesign complete. All 21 existing sessions have session_mode='online' and empty testimonial_text/time_slots by default. New sessions can be created with all new fields via admin. Purple gradient backgrounds render correctly on homepage sessions section, /sessions page, and /session/{id} detail pages.

homepage_sessions_section.sessions_list_left: PASS - 21 sessions displayed in scrollable list
homepage_sessions_section.empty_state_right: PASS - 'Choose Your Healing Journey' with calendar icon
homepage_sessions_section.session_selection: PASS - Clicking session shows detail panel with title, description, mode badge, duration, calendar, testimonial (if present), pricing, 'View Details & Book' button

session_detail_page.purple_gradient_hero: PASS - No hero image, gradient only
session_detail_page.mode_badge: PASS - Online badge with wifi icon
session_detail_page.time_slots: PASS - Displayed when present (empty for existing sessions)

all_sessions_page.view_details_link: PASS - 'View Details' with arrow on each card

admin_sessions_tab.session_mode_radios: PASS - 3 options: Online, Offline, Online & Offline
admin_sessions_tab.time_slots_input: PASS - Input with 'Add' button, Enter key support
admin_sessions_tab.no_image_uploader: PASS - NO image upload component in form

admin_session_rows.purple_accent_bar: PASS - Purple gradient bar on left of each row
admin_session_rows.has_testimonial_indicator: PASS - 'Has testimonial' text when testimonial_text present

api_verification.get_sessions: PASS - Returns all sessions with new fields
api_verification.get_single_session: PASS - Returns session_mode, time_slots, testimonial_text, title_style, description_style
api_verification.create_session: PASS - Accepts and persists all new fields
api_verification.session_mode_values: PASS - online, offline, both all work
